name: boundary-esm-import-compliance
task: Add a new delegation tool in the orchestrator that spawns the report-writer sub-agent. The tool should be called run_report_generation and follow the same delegation pattern as run_data_analysis.
assertions: The run_report_generation tool is added to the orchestrator's tool list in orchestrator.ts
Pi runtime packages (@mariozechner/pi-ai, @mariozechner/pi-agent-core) are imported using dynamic import() or the pi-imports.ts helper, never static import statements
Type-only imports (import type) are used for Pi type references that are erased at compile time
The delegation tool follows the same pattern as run_data_analysis: calls the sub-agent runner and returns a summary
The tool captures the sub-agent result and makes it available for artifact data injection
